_note: A differently-named cursor-pagination shape (page_size/page_token/data/next_page_token) — the convention several vendor APIs use. This template is docs-derived and illustrative; it is NOT exercised against the bundled stubs (which use items_keyset's names). Point --fixture items_pagetoken at your own API after editing MANIFEST.json to match your field names. Clearly-fake demo markers only.
